name: Indefinite-Term Employment Contract
description: A standard permanent employment agreement establishing an ongoing working relationship between an employer and employee.
content:
INDEFINITE-TERM EMPLOYMENT CONTRACT

This Employment Contract (the "Contract") is entered into as of {{formatDate signature_date}} by and between the Employer and the Employee named below, establishing a permanent, ongoing employment relationship.

1. THE PARTIES

A. EMPLOYER
Company Name: {{employer_name}}
Address: {{employer_address}}
Registration/Tax ID: {{employer_tax_id}}
Official Reg. No: {{employer_reg_number}}

B. EMPLOYEE
Full Name: {{employee_name}}
ID/Passport No: {{employee_id_no}}
Address: {{employee_address}}
Phone: {{employee_phone}}
Email: {{employee_email}}

2. POSITION AND WORK LOCATION

Job Title/Position: {{job_title}}
Primary Work Location: {{work_location}}

3. TERM OF EMPLOYMENT & PROBATION

This Contract is for an Indefinite Term (Permanent).
Commencement Date: {{formatDate start_date}}
Probationary Period: {{#if (eq has_probation_period 'Yes')}}{{probation_months}} months from the Commencement Date.{{else}}No probationary period applies.{{/if}}

4. WORKING HOURS AND OVERTIME

Standard Weekly Hours: {{weekly_hours}} hours.
Working Days: {{working_days}}
Daily Working Hours: {{daily_hours}}
Rest Breaks: Will be provided in accordance with applicable labor laws.
Overtime: {{#if (eq overtime_allowed 'Yes')}}The Employee agrees to work reasonable overtime when required, which will be compensated according to legal standards.{{else}}Overtime is strictly prohibited unless pre-approved in writing.{{/if}}

5. COMPENSATION AND BENEFITS

The Employee shall be paid a {{wage_type}} salary of {{monthly_wage}} per month.
Payment Schedule: Salary will be paid on the {{payment_day}}th day of each month via direct deposit.
Salary Review Policy: {{wage_increase_policy}}

6. ANNUAL LEAVE

The Employee shall be entitled to paid annual leave and public holidays in strict accordance with the prevailing labor laws of the jurisdiction.

7. SPECIAL CONDITIONS (If any)

{{#if special_conditions}}{{special_conditions}}{{else}}No additional special conditions apply.{{/if}}

8. TERMINATION AND NOTICE PERIOD

Either party may terminate this Contract by providing written notice. The notice periods and severance pay (if applicable) shall be governed by statutory labor laws. During any probationary period, either party may terminate this Contract without prior notice or severance pay.

This Contract has been executed in duplicate on the date first written above.

EMPLOYER

{{employer_name}}


Signature: _________________________

EMPLOYEE

{{employee_name}}


Signature: _________________________

fields.name: work_location
fields.label: Primary Work Location
fields.placeholder: e.g., Company HQ or specific branch.

fields.name: wage_increase_policy
fields.label: Salary Review / Increase Policy
fields.placeholder: e.g., Annual review based on performance and inflation.
